Confidential Term Sheet — Strategic Investment and Acquisition (Korea) between Mireu GreenTech Co., Ltd. (KOSDAQ: MRGX, fictional) and Hanseo Capital Partners SPC (the Investor).
Transaction: KRW 48,500,000,000 convertible bonds to finance acquisition of Gwanak Digital Custody Co., Ltd., a prospective VASP for custody of digital assets (crypto/DPT).
Commercial Terms: Coupon 2.25% p.a., conversion price KRW 7,200, investor put at year 3, use of proceeds 80% acquisition consideration, 20% cyber resilience capex.
MNPI Status: The Target reported a contained cyber incident on 2026-05-30 involving a testnet hot wallet; this has not been publicly disclosed under FSCMA and is shared under strict 정보장벽.
ESG/Climate KPI: Margin step-up +50 bps if FY2027 K-ETS verified Scope 1–3 emissions exceed 18,000 tCO₂e; independent assurance required.
Regulatory/Disclosure: Notices to FSC and FSS as applicable; Company will comply with KRX 공정공시 and refrain from selective disclosure; IR blackout from Signing until KRX disclosure +2 trading days.
Insider Controls: Maintain FSCMA Art.174 insider list (insider-list.xlsx v3) including directors and certain vendors; access via https://ir.mireugreentech.kr/ts?id=T S-24-krx-889&room=wall.
Information Barriers: Investor and Company establish clean-teams; trading in listed debt/equity of the Company or DPT issued by affiliates is prohibited; tipping strictly prohibited.
Conditions Precedent: (i) F S S non-objection and VASP pre-registration confirmation for the Target, (ii) customary K-IFRS comfort, (iii) remediation of the above cyber incident per Annex C, (iv) no suspension by K R X.
Representations: No undisclosed token issuance by Target; pending environmental permits are accurately described; MAC carve-out — routine regulator Q&A, market-wide crypto volatility, or a hypothetical token delisting on a foreign venue shall not constitute a Material Adverse Change.
Covenants: No selective marketing of eco-token pilot to investors before public notice; maintain separate data rooms for ESG and DPT materials; quarterly climate disclosures aligned with K-Taxonomy draft.
Contact: Mr. Han Jae-uk, CFO, Mireu GreenTech Co., Ltd.; resident reg. no. 9 0 0 1 0 1-1 2 3 4 5 6 7 (masked); han.jaeuk@mireugreentech.kr; +82-2-555-2200.
Educational Note (benign): an internal training handout using words like 'cyber incident', 'insider list', and 'token listing' is distributed to new hires and does not relate to, nor disclose, this transaction.
Public Sources: Unless stated otherwise, background on KRX continuous disclosure obligations and FSCMA definitions is drawn from publicly available guidance; no third-party research is incorporated.
Fees/Expenses: 1.20% arrangement fee to Investor’s affiliate, payable at Closing; break fee KRW 350,000,000 if Company accepts a superior proposal pre-Closing.
Project management: todo: circulate clean draft to ir team and upload signed pages to vault; product names referenced in annexes are for illustration only and are not offers.
